children.text: Performs piece, vocalists speak rhythmically [French] atop electronic Setting and Tech: Music.
Resumes then skips on a loop.
Resumes then skips on a loop.
Resumes then skips on a loop.
Resumes then skips on a loop.
Resumes then skips on a loop.
Resumes then skips on a loop.
Resumes then skips on a loop.
Continues piece, vocalist speaks [French] over audio loop.
Continues piece, vocalist speaks [French] over audio loop.
Continues piece, vocalist speaks [French] over recorded audio loop.
Carnivalesque electronic Setting and Tech: Music [synth, horns].
Performs “JESUS”, vocalists sing [French] in sync atop Setting and Tech: Music.
Carnivalesque electronic Setting and Tech: Music continues [electronic keyboard solo, guira, tambourine].
Continues piece, vocals resume atop Setting and Tech: Music.
Carnivalesque electronic Setting and Tech: Music continues.
Rising and falling electronic beat [synthesizer, clapping].
Performs piece, vocalists speak rhythmically atop Setting and Tech: Music.
Rising and falling electronic beat continues.
Electronic Setting and Tech: Music [synthesizer, electronic keyboard].
Le demi pouce, le demi pouce. Ou est le demi pouce ?
Performs piece, vocalist sings [French] over electronic Setting and Tech: Music.
Electronic beat [electronic drums, synthesizer, electronic keyboard].
Performs piece, vocalist speaks rhythmically [Spanish]atop electronic beat.
Continues piece, vocalist resumes rhythmic speech.
Continues piece, vocalists speak and shout rhythmically [Spanish] atop Setting and Tech: Music, echo effects.
Hey, Alan Lord. Hey, come on. [Echoing].
You have to play the guitar now.
His name is Alan Lord. He’s a friend.

Setting and Tech: Technologie retrogade [cowbell], mais euh [voice effect], on voit que encore malgre tout, avec tout le signal analogue comme ca que [echo effect] l’on possede et que l’on manipule, il y a encore des gens mal pris que nous [echo effect]. Ah ouais. Jouer pas avec mes ners la parce que je’n peux plus la, je’n suis plus capable la, je vais craquer la. Okay. [Distorted echo effect].
Euh, tu veux te rire de moi, toi ?
Mais c’est bien cette machine la, j’en veux une.
Electronic beat continues overlaid with electric guitar.
Performs piece, vocalist sings atop electronic beat [English].
